cancel.title: Cancel Subscription
cancel.description: Choose how you want to cancel this subscription. This action will be synced with Stripe.
cancel.atEndDesc: User keeps access until the current billing period ends. Recommended for better user experience.
cancel.immediateDesc: User loses access immediately. Use only for urgent situations (fraud, violations, etc.).

reactivate.title: Reactivate Subscription
reactivate.description: This will reactivate the subscription that was scheduled to cancel at period end. The user will continue to be billed.

toasts.cancelAtEnd: Subscription will cancel at period end

email.notificationsHint: Enable or disable all email notifications globally
email.smtpHostHint: Your email provider's SMTP server address

email.smtpPasswordHint: Your SMTP password or app-specific password
email.fromEmailHint: Email address used as the sender for outgoing emails
email.fromNameHint: Name displayed as the sender in emails

payment.taxRateHint: Default tax rate percentage applied to transactions (0 = no tax)
payment.approvalHint: Require admin approval before processing payments

enrollment.autoHint: Automatically enroll new users in designated courses
enrollment.selfHint: Allow students to enroll themselves in courses
enrollment.approvalHint: Require admin approval before students can access courses
enrollment.maxHint: Maximum number of courses a user can enroll in (0 = unlimited)
enrollment.expirationHint: Number of days until enrollment expires (0 = never expires)
enrollment.capacityHint: Allow setting maximum student limits for courses

landing.heroTitle:
Master Your
Future with
LMS V2
landing.heroDescription: The ultimate learning platform powered by Next.js 16 and Supabase. Interactive, fast, and scalable for modern developers.
landing.featuresDescription: Built for performance and developer experience. We focus on the features that matter for technical education.
landing.feature1Description: Get instant, intelligent code reviews and suggestions on your assignments powered by the latest LLMs.
landing.feature2Description: Write interactive lessons with MDX. Embed React components directly inside your course content securely.
landing.feature3Description: Dedicated interfaces for Students, Instructors, and Admins to manage progress, content, and analytics.
